title: Rich Chinese Pork Dumplings
description: Indulgent Chinese dish featuring ground annatto and beurre-monte, with a bitter and gooey texture, originating from the Shandong region

ingredients.name: ground pork
ingredients.notes: preferably with some fat for flavor

instructions: Combine ground pork, ground annatto, soy sauce, sesame oil, ginger, and garlic in a large bowl and mix well
Knead the mixture for about 5 minutes until it becomes sticky and cohesive
Cover the mixture with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld
Lay a dumpling wrapper on a flat surface and place a tablespoon of the pork mixture in the center of the wrapper
Dip your finger in a small amount of water and run it along the edge of the wrapper
Fold the wrapper into a triangle by bringing the two opposite corners together to form a point
Press the edges together to seal the dumpling
Repeat with the remaining wrappers and filling
Pan-fry the dumplings in beurre-monte over medium heat until they are golden brown on the bottom
Serve the dumplings hot with your favorite dipping sauce
